data.title: Bitcoin Maximalism Is Fading As Top Altcoins Like PEPENODE Rise
data.description:
What to Know: Bitcoin’s ETF-driven evolution into digital gold is softening strict maximalism and encouraging more diversified crypto portfolios. Capital is rotating into top altcoins with real narratives, especially in infrastructure, AI and DePIN rather than pure speculation. PEPENODE mixes meme culture with gamified virtual mining and multi token rewards to keep holders engaged. For most of crypto’s history the script was simple: own Bitcoin, ignore everything else
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-maximalism-fading-top-altcoins-pepenode-rise/

data.title: DeFiance Capital CEO: PUMP has repurchased 11% of its circulating supply, but the price is still below the public offering price.
data.description: Arthur Cheong, CEO of DeFiance Capital, stated in an article on the X platform that since PumpFun launched its buyback program, the cumulative buyback amount of PUMP has reached 11% of the circulating supply, with the total buyback amount estimated at an annualized rate of between $400 million and $500 million.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The minimum claim threshold for the PLAYSOLANA airdrop is 235 points.
data.description: Binance Alpha will launch Play Solana (PLAYSOLANA) Alpha trading on November 14, 2025 at 20:00. Users holding at least 235 Binance Alpha Points can receive an airdrop of 1000 PLAYSOLANA tokens on a first-come, first-served basis.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: ZEC/BTC may rise to 0.2
data.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform, "PAMP IT!", and indicated that ZEC/BTC could rise to 0.2.

data.title: WOJAK's market capitalization surpasses 20 million USDT, up over 50% in 24 hours.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of WOJAK, the Meme coin in the SOL ecosystem, briefly surged past 20 million USDT, currently standing at approximately 19.25 million USDT, representing a 24-hour increase of over 50%. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile, and investors should exercise caution when participating.

data.title: The whale sold 60,001 SOL tokens, incurring a loss of approximately $3.3 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, address 4YaiAn just sold 60,001 SOL tokens that it purchased three months ago, for approximately $8.64 million. This sale resulted in a loss of approximately $3.3 million.

data.title: Binance Launches Coffee Missions with USDT Rewards for MENA Traders
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is introducing a new initiative called Coffee Missions, aimed at rewarding traders from selected MENA countries. The activity, which runs from 2025-11-13 13:00 (UTC) to 2025-12-13 19:59 (UTC), invites Regular and VIP 1-3 users to participate in daily crypto tasks across Spot, Futures, and Convert trades, as well as making deposits. Participants can earn points and climb the ranks to unlock rewards, with top traders eligible for bonus USDT token vouchers.

To join the Coffee Missions, users must log in to their Binance account and visit the activity page to click “Join Now.” Tasks completed during the activity period will earn points, and the top 800 users by total points will receive a 40 USDT token voucher each. Additionally, the top 200 Earn Stakers, who must complete all tasks, will also receive a 40 USDT token voucher. Tasks include completing Spot trades of at least 50 USDT equivalent, Futures trades of at least 100 USDT equivalent, Convert trades of at least 50 USDT equivalent, and making fiat or crypto deposits of at least 50 USDT equivalent. Earn Staking requires staking on Binance Simple Earn Flexible USDT for 14 days during the campaign period, with a minimum stake of 100 USDT equivalent.

Important notes include the requirement for users to complete account verification (KYC), and each task can be completed once per day unless otherwise stated. Rewards will be distributed as USDT token vouchers within 30 working days after the campaign ends, with vouchers remaining valid for 30 days after distribution. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users for dishonest behavior or interference with program code, and may amend the Activity Terms at its discretion.

data.title: Binance will launch spot trading pairs such as ACM/TRY and open its trading robot service.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will launch the ACM/TRY, DODO/TRY, HEI/TRY, and XTZ/TRY spot trading pairs on November 26, 2025 at 12:00 (UTC), and will simultaneously open its algorithmic order book trading bot service for these pairs. (This news item was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Off-exchange institutions bought 9,945 ETH, and at one point made a profit of over $94 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an off-exchange institution/whale address recently purchased 9,945 ETH from FalconX, Wintertermute, and Coinbase, worth approximately $31.89 million. On-chain records show that this institution had previously realized profits exceeding $94 million through multiple ETH swing trading operations.

data.title: Oracle’s $300B AI deal meets investor drag as debt surges to $96B, stock crashes 5%
data.description:
Oracle is facing one of its toughest market moments after the company’s massive AI deal with OpenAI collided with rising doubts from Wall Street.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracles-300b-ai-deal-meets-investor-drag/

data.title: A borrower who had taken out a long position in WBTC had their account liquidated, with the liquidation amount reaching $6.67 million.
data.description: According to PyShield monitoring, when Bitcoin fell below $100,000, the address 0xceef...ba42 was liquidated on Compound for holding a long position in WBTC. This address had previously used WBTC as collateral to borrow USDT and DAI, ultimately resulting in a total liquidation amount of $6.67 million.

data.title: Massive Outflows Slam Bitcoin ETFs in Second-Worst Day on Record
data.description:
U. S. spot bitcoin ETFs faced intense selling pressure on Thursday, with the group recording nearly $870 million in net outflows - their second-largest withdrawal day since launching.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/massive-outflows-slam-bitcoin-etfs-in-second-worst-day-on-record/

data.title: HIPPO briefly plummeted 70%, falling below $0.002.
data.description: Market data shows that HIPPO experienced a brief plunge, falling below 0.002 USDT and currently trading at 0.002148 USDT, representing a daily drop of over 70%.

data.title: Bruce, founder of Maiton MSX: The previous generation of Bitcoin mining machines, the S19 and M60 series, have reached their shutdown price.
data.description: Bruce, founder of MSX, posted on the X platform, "The previous generation of Bitcoin mining machines, the S19 and M60 series, have finally reached their shutdown price. If we don't shut them down, we'll lose money on electricity next month."

data.title: Trader Nachi: Bitcoin breaks below key range, market unlikely to see significant recovery before year-end.
data.description: In his latest market analysis, crypto trader Nachi stated that although Bitcoin rebounded briefly after falling below the key $100,000 level, it subsequently broke below its core support level again, maintaining an overall weak trend. He pointed out that the US stock market's momentum weakened due to decreased expectations of a December rate cut and the postponement of the government shutdown, with investors inclined to take profits at the end of the year. Nachi believes that while crypto assets still face some downside risks, the market has already experienced a significant correction, and further shorting at this point may have limited upside potential. In contrast, previously strong crypto-related stocks such as Coinbase (COIN) and Robinhood (HOOD) still have the potential for further declines, offering a better risk-reward ratio. However, shorting requires flexibility. He suggests that investors who are not skilled at shorting should increase their cash positions and wait for a more favorable entry point, and predicts that the overall crypto market is unlikely to see a significant recovery before the end of the year.

data.title: Old Ethereum holders sell at the fastest pace since 2021

Ethereum whales with wallets aged 3-10 years are selling at the fastest pace since 2021, accelerating the profit-realizing trend that started in August.

data.title: RaveDAO Genesis Membership sold out within four days.
data.description: The RaveDAO Genesis Membership NFT minting event, originally scheduled for five days, sold out a day early due to strong demand from the global community. The selling speeds for each membership tier within four days were as follows: Emerald Pass: Sold out within 11 minutes; Black Pass: Sold out within 1 hour; Gold Pass: Sold out within 23 hours; Platinum Pass: Sold out by the fourth day. The project will hold a Genesis rewards lottery, with the winners announced on X and Telegram one week after TGE, and rewards distributed two weeks after TGE. The lottery will use ARPA Randcast to provide verifiable randomness. Specific information regarding the project token, RAVE, has not yet been disclosed.

data.title: DTCC Lists Five Spot XRP ETFs Amid Expectations for November Launch
data.description:
The Depository Trust and Clearing Corporation has listed five spot XRP exchange-traded funds, signaling potential launches later this month as market interest in altcoin ETFs grows.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/dtcc-lists-five-spot-xrp-etfs-amid-expectations-for-november-launch/
